claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: native form, visible label, textarea and submit or stop buttons
semantics.rolePolicy: Persistent errors use alert semantics; busy state is applied to the form only while work is in flight.

keyboard.behavior: In the default mode inserts a newline. The explicit enter shortcut submits while Shift+Enter remains multiline.
Submits only when the mod-enter enhancement is selected.
Never submits while composition is active.

formBehavior: The named textarea participates in native FormData and reset. With no onSubmitMessage callback, native form submission remains authoritative.
nonColor: Offline, error, submitting and streaming states use text, disabled actions and native busy semantics.
responsive: The textarea resizes vertically, actions wrap, attachments remain named, and coarse pointers receive preferred targets.
consumerResponsibilities: Own network, storage, upload, model and tool execution.
Validate and authorize submitted content at the trusted boundary.
Localize all labels, errors, shortcuts and attachment actions.
Do not put secrets in visible drafts or attachment metadata.
